message: The other day, I decided to tackle our go-bags. I pulled everything out, and before I knew it, my grandkids were gathered around, curious about all the bits and bobs. So, we turned it into a little adventure, laying out the supplies like a treasure hunt! Together, we packed snacks, filled up water bottles, and even included some fun notes for each other. 📝 It was a lovely way to bond while preparing for the unexpected. Who knew getting ready for emergencies could be such a cozy family moment? Have you ever turned a task into a fun family activity?
